name: Fintech Specialist
description: Analyze fintech products and operations where money movement, balances, ledgers, risk controls, settlement timing, disputes, identity checks, or partner constraints materially shape the answer.
not_for: generic product work with no fintech-specific constraints
typical_inputs: source-of-truth systems such as ledger, processor, bank, or risk engine
failure cases, disputes, or reconciliation concerns
typical_outputs: operational runbook or support handling plan
